blocks.code:
(define source "(+ 10 20)")
(define level-1 (eval source))
(define level-2 (eval (string-append "(+ " (number->string level-1) " 100)")))
(define level-3 (eval (string-append "(* " (number->string level-2) " 2)")))
(list (list "source" source)
      (list "level-1" level-1)
      (list "level-2" level-2)
      (list "level-3" level-3)
      (list "meta-eval-works" (= level-3 260)))
